text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Doto. Care to join me 
for some partner running?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-What?! Y-You want me to be your partner…?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I have no doubt that you and I
will be able to synchronize splendidly!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-In that case, how could I refuse?! 
I'll do my best to ——

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hm? Synchronize? Like synchronized swimming? Y-You said partner running, right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, may the refrain we compose 
be as beautiful as two butterflies 
stroking the wind with their wings!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-Butterfly strokes?! So you do mean swimming!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-No worries, I can handle that! 
I just need to go change into my swimsuit!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Wearing swimsuits while running 
would indeed be a sight to behold! 
A marvelous idea!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then I too shall don my swimsuit!
